word: H1494 - גַּזָז - gazâz - gaw-zaz' - Cut off

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּזז

Transliteration: gâzaz

Phonetic: gaw-zaz'

BDB Definition:

  1. to shear, mow
    1. (Qal)
      1. to shear
      2. shearer (participle)
    2. (Niphal) to be cut off, be destroyed

Origin: a primitive root [akin to H1468]

TWOT entry: 336

Part(s) of speech: Verb
